description: Agent lifecycle hooks for bosun. Compatible with Codex, Claude Code, and Copilot CLI.

SessionStart.command: echo "[hook] Agent session started: task=${VE_TASK_ID} sdk=${VE_SDK} branch=${VE_BRANCH_NAME}"
SessionStart.description: Log agent session start for audit trail

SessionStop.command: echo "[hook] Agent session ended: task=${VE_TASK_ID} sdk=${VE_SDK}"
SessionStop.description: Log agent session end for audit trail

PrePush.description: Check tracked changes for whitespace and conflict-marker issues before push
Run detected repository quality gate before push (Node.js)
